issues.description: Wrong trigger: DSL uses 'Activated' but effectText specifies '[End of Your Turn]' which should be 'EndOfTurn'
Missing condition: effectText requires '{Impel Down} type Characters' but DSL has no type restriction in target
Wrong cost filter: effectText says 'cost of 2 or more' but DSL has maxCost: 2 and minCost: 2 (exactly 2), should be minCost: 2 only
Missing optional flag: The effect says 'You may return' which should be marked as optional
Missing condition linking: The second action (GiveDon) should only occur 'if' the first action (ReturnToHand) is performed, but there's no conditional linkage
